display_text: Essence Ring, Tier 2: Neutral item that instantly increases your current and maximum health by 240 for 10 seconds upon activation. This burst of survivability provides a temporary health buffer for clutch moments in skirmishes or to survive burst damage. Its substantial mana cost requires careful mana management. Stats: CD: 25s, Mana: 160, Duration: 10s, Health Gain: 240.
search_text: burst health item, instant heal item, health buffer, survival neutral, clutch item, tier 2 neutral, temporary HP, survivability active, essence ring, neutral sustain, defensive neutral, magic stick alternative, mana cost heal
